title: Just Dandy
description: Fluffy dandelions with particles, for extra pizzazz in plains and other places.
body:
## Overview

This mod adds fluffy dandelions to plains, oak forests, and meadows by default. Fluffy dandelions spawn gently bobbing seed particles when not in rain. Any entities moving through fluffy dandelions (projectiles, players, mobs) spawn greater concentrations of particles.

Using bone meal on a dandelion will cause it to grow into its fluffy variant. Pollinated bees can also turn dandelions fluffy, at the same rate as other pollinated crops.

Fluffy dandelions are somewhat delicate, so they can only be collected using shears (dropping a normal dandelion otherwise). 1.21+: Fluffy dandelions do not drop normal dandelions anymore, instead dropping nothing if broken without shears.

## Config

You can alter the following:
- A multiplier for general dandelion particle density (default: **1.0**)
- A multiplier for dandelion particle lifespan (default: **1.0**)

### Biome Tag
Using a datapack, players can alter one of two tags which indicate the biomes in which the two types of fluffy dandelion patches spawn:
- `just_dandy:has_fluffy_dandelion` includes plains and forests. Normal-sized patches.
- `just_dandy:has_frequent_fluffy_dandelion` includes meadows, and has patches of fluffy dandelions spawn with greater frequency and in greater density.
- `just_dandy:has_thick_dandelion` has very frequent dandelion patches, and exclusively includes Dandelion Fields from the mod [World of Wonder](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-of-wonder).

---

**Requires [Blueprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint).** Includes optional compatibility with many different mods; see the [Versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-dandy/versions) tab and the [Changelog](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-dandy/changelog) for more information.

Feel free to direct any suggestions towards the [issue tracker](https://github.com/davidjjung/just_dandy/issues)!

Credit to GLaDOS Edition for the block texture, and Booleven for his commendable efforts in porting my 1.16.5 mess to 1.19.2!
